title: HilbertBench Artifact Catalog
description: The central registry mapping SHA-256 hashes to their artifact metadata records. Ensures O(1) lookups.

hbcatalog_version.description: Schema version. v1.x guarantees immutability of the index structure.

trace_id.description: Globally unique identifier. Must match the root trace.json manifest.

created_at.description: UTC nanoseconds when this catalog was finalized/sealed.

artifacts.description: Keys are sha256:<hash> by convention. Key format and key==artifact_hash integrity enforced by reader/verify.py.
